titleStmt.title: SII 6.645: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 645. (A.R. No. 199 of 1899). ON THE SAME TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti caraṇasarōruhavihatavilōcana trilōcanapramukhākhilaprithvīśvarakāritakāvērītīra karikālakularatnapradīpāhitakumārāṁkuśa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara śivapādaśēkhara parāṁganāputra śrīnannicōḍamahārājulu śrīsakava¨rṣamulu 1081The date can also be read as 10[70].gunēṁṭi yuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁttinimittamunaṁ chrītribhuvanamalla
dēvacōḍamahārājulakuṁ dalli mācalamahādēviki dha¨rmmā¨rttamugā mā nijarājadhāniyaina koṭyadona tribhuvanamallaśrīkēśavadēvaraku havibaliya¨rccanalakuṁ bātrapāguḍamunakuṁ goṭyadona yāgnēyamu valana danaseṭṭi kaṭṭiṁcchina ceṟvu dha¨rmmā¨rttavugānu yiddumu sēnu maṟtuvugānu ḍa
bhbhayi cēmaṟtulu nu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkatārakamugā niccitimi . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harētu vasundharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭiva[¨r]ṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © yī dha¨rmmuvunaku vignamusēsinavāru vāranāsi vraccinavāṁḍu . gaṁggakaṟta kavilala vadhiṁccinavāru peddakoḍku kapālamunaṁ guḍcinavāṇḍu .
Digital edition of SII 6.645 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
